CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, value DOUBLE);
CREATE TABLE more_data (id INT, val DOUBLE);
SELECT sys.var_samp(value + (SELECT avg(val) FROM more_data)) FROM test_data;
SELECT id, sys.var_samp(value) FROM test_data GROUP BY id;
SELECT t.id, sys.var_samp(m.value) FROM test_data AS t INNER JOIN more_data AS m ON t.id = m.id GROUP BY t.id;
SELECT sys.var_samp(value) FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT sys.var_samp((SELECT SUM(value) FROM test_data) / (SELECT COUNT(value) FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL));
SELECT t1.id, sys.var_samp(t1.value) - sys.var_samp(t2.val) AS difference FROM test_data t1, more_data t2 WHERE t1.id = t2.id GROUP BY t1.id;
